name: Nightmatter Circlet
description: History Added in the Exalt Version 6.0.0.0 (Sep 2025) update.
effects: +100 HP, +100 MP, +4 ATT, +4 DEX, +4 VIT, +4 WIS

Enigmatic Lifeline: Restores 300 HP when taking damage below 50% HP. Cooldown: 180 seconds Mystic Restoration: 50% on ability use to gain Energized for 10 seconds. Cooldown: 20 seconds Rapid Decay: On ability use poison enemies within 6 tiles, inflicting 1000 damage and causing them to take 5% more damage from you for 5 seconds. Cooldown: 15 seconds
